case_title: VERITY COLTMAN VS. PATRICIA MARIA BARLOW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF VERITY COLTMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICIA MARIA BARLOW IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATED TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA MARIA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/17/2019. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLTMAN, VERITY AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA MARIA
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF COLTMAN, VERITY
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-17-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-02-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL - SC 150 FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLTMAN, VERITY
STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY COLTMAN, VERITY BARLOW, PATRICIA MARIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,609.20 FILED BY COLTMAN, VERITY AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED DEC-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA MARIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLTMAN, VERITY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA MARIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
